description: An IAM analyst must provision a new account and access for a new employee starting in the marketing department.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new hire request from HR, including the user's name, title, and department.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly processes the new hire ticket.

nodes.task_description: Create a new user account in Active Directory based on the corporate naming convention.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully creates the user account.

nodes.task_description: Assign the user to the 'Marketing' security group, which automatically grants them access to the required folders and applications.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst assigns the correct role-based access, following the principle of least privilege.
